pair.script:
import { readFileSync } from 'fs';
export function readFile(p) { return readFileSync(p, 'utf8'); }

export function readFile(p) { return readFileSync(p, 'utf8'); }
export function parseJSON(s) { return JSON.parse(s); }

import { execSync } from 'child_process';
export function runBash(cmd) { return execSync(cmd, { encoding: 'utf8' }); }

export function formatDate(d) { return new Date(d).toISOString().slice(0, 10); }

export function parseCsv(text) { return text.split('\n').map(r => r.split(',')); }

import yaml from 'js-yaml';
export function loadYaml(s) { return yaml.load(s); }

import { config } from 'dotenv';
export function loadEnv() { config(); return process.env; }
